description: render the current page (or a single element ref) to a screenshot file (read-only artifact)
rules: read-only — captures a screenshot, mutates nothing
runs `playwright-cli screenshot [PW_REF]` via the bundled npx wrapper
runs inside record_store so the image artifact is contained
degrades gracefully: records when a live browser is not requested/available
usage: Optional PW_REF (element ref like e5) screenshots one element; optional PW_SESSION isolates the session. Output: screenshot.json (audit log; the image lands in record_store when live).
limitation: Needs npx + @playwright/cli + an already-open page to capture a real image; offline it records the unreachable state and still emits valid output.
